productTitle: Ubiquiti G4 Instant Cover Light Grey
name: Ubiquiti G4 Instant Cover Light Grey
title: Ubiquiti G4 Instant Cover Light Grey
short_description: Custom cover for the G4 Instant camera, Light Grey
description: The Ubiquiti G4 Instant Cover in light gray is a practical accessory designed to protect and customize your G4 Instant camera. Made from durable rubber, this lightweight cover (just 14 g) offers added protection against dust, minor impacts, and environmental wear, ensuring your device stays in excellent condition over time. Its precision-fit design allows for seamless installation without interfering with the camera’s functionality or image quality. The elegant light gray finish adds a subtle aesthetic upgrade, blending well with various environments for indoor setups. Perfect for users looking to extend the lifespan of their equipment while maintaining a clean and modern look, the G4 Instant Cover combines style, protection, and convenience in one simple accessory.
